$comment: Descriptive specification — NOT a deployable Logic App workflow. Note: with the D365 Customer Service voice channel as the runtime (see docs/biz/voice.md § 11), recording, real-time transcription, and IVR are all provided natively by D365 over ACS. This file is therefore largely SUPERSEDED for ingest; it is retained as the design source for a future post-transcription enrichment Logic App that would push redacted transcript metadata from Dataverse to Fabric (OneLake) and anchor a hash in Azure Confidential Ledger for AI Act Art. 26(6).
name: udcsp-live-transcription-route
trigger: ACS call connected event (Microsoft.Communication.IncomingCall via Event Grid) — superseded by D365 voice channel native ingest
steps: Stream call audio to Azure AI Speech STT
Send transcript chunks to Foundry topic-router via APIM /agents/topic-router/messages
Route to the Foundry topic-router agent by intent/language
Escalate to D365 human agent when escalation policy matches (apps/voice/escalation/escalation-config.yaml)
Persist redacted transcript metadata for audit (ADLS Gen2 voice-recordings/, anchored in Confidential Ledger)
